home.title3: to make your work more relaxed.
home.subtitle: Kryptoncode is here to help you handle repetitive tasks. Discover various bot scripts for Telegram, Discord, and Web that are simple, super fast, and ready to use!

community.title: Community Terminal
community.subtitle: Connect with other developers, get early access to new releases, and help shape the future of our tools.

buy.orderExpiredDesc: Your order has expired. Create a new one.

premium.title: Premium Access
premium.subtitle: Choose a plan for the bot or product you want. Pay with USDC, get a license key.
premium.paymentNetwork: Payment via USDC on Base Network
premium.step1Desc: Select a plan for the bot you want
premium.step2Desc: Transfer USDC on Base Network with unique memo
premium.step3Desc: License key is automatically generated for you
premium.confirmedDesc: Your license key is now active. Save the key below and activate it in the Telegram bot.
premium.instructionDesc: Send USDC on the Base network to the following address
premium.scanDesc: Scan QR or copy details manually
premium.memoDesc: Include this memo in the transaction note so payment can be detected
premium.keyPending: Key will activate automatically once payment is detected. Type /activate <key> in the Telegram bot

product.notFound: Product not found or an error occurred
product.projectDesc: Access this project directly to see its performance and results in real-time.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.desc: The directory or file you are looking for might have been removed, had its name changed, or is temporarily unavailable.
